meta.project: منصة تجارة إلكترونية متكاملة (E-Commerce & ERP System)

product_overview: An integrated e-commerce storefront paired with ERP capabilities (inventory, orders, customers, finances and admin tools) to increase conversion and automate operations. Supports storefront shopping flows and a protected admin panel for business operations.
core_goals: Provide a fast, localized storefront experience that maximizes conversion (product discovery, variants, cart, checkout).
Automate order lifecycle including delivery integration, exchanges/returns and inventory adjustments (packs decrement components).
Offer a full-featured admin ERP: product/category/coupon management, inventory operations, orders processing, finances and invoices.
Support multi-language routes and secure admin access using JWT cookies.
Surface stock alerts (out of stock, low stock) and enforce variant-level availability and pricing.

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate returning customers using phone or email and password, then redirect to the storefront.
user_flows: Navigate to /en/login -> Fill in phone or email input field -> Fill in password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> Receive successful auth -> Redirect to /en
Navigate to /en/login -> Fill in phone or email input field -> Fill in password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: User Sign Up
features.description: Create a new customer account from the sign-up form (name, phone, password); accounts can also be created automatically when placing an order.
user_flows: Navigate to /en/login -> Switch to sign-up form -> Fill in name, phone, password fields -> Click Sign Up button -> See success message -> Redirect to /en
Navigate to /en/login -> Switch to sign-up form -> Fill in invalid phone field (not 10 digits or wrong prefix) -> Click Sign Up button -> See phone validation error and remain on sign-up form

features.name: Browse Products
features.description: Browse the product catalog, use live search and filters, and open product detail pages.
user_flows: Navigate to /en/products -> View product grid -> Use search input to filter by product name or description -> Click on a product to view details -> Redirect to /en/products/:id
Navigate to /en/products -> Apply filters that return no results -> See 'no products found' message

features.name: View Product Detail
features.description: View product images, description, options/variants, upsell recommendations and add selected variant to cart.
user_flows: Navigate to /en/products/:id -> View product images, name, price, description -> Select product options/variants -> Click Add to Cart button -> See toast notification that item was added -> Navigate to /en/cart
Navigate to /en/products/:id -> Select a variant that is out of stock -> See 'نفذت الكمية' (out of stock) message -> Add to Cart is disabled

features.name: Shopping Cart
features.description: Manage items to purchase: update quantities, remove items, view totals and proceed to checkout.
user_flows: Navigate to /en/cart -> View cart items with quantities and prices -> Increase item quantity -> See total price updated -> Click proceed to checkout -> Redirect to /en/checkout
Navigate to /en/cart -> Increase item quantity beyond available stock -> See 'بقي X فقط' (only X left) message -> Quantity remains unchanged

features.name: Checkout / Place Order
features.description: Collect delivery and contact information, choose delivery method, apply coupons, and place an order. Successful orders redirect to an order-success page; failures show an order-failed page.
user_flows: Navigate to /en/checkout -> Fill in delivery address and contact info -> Select delivery method -> Apply valid coupon code -> Review order summary -> Click Place Order button -> Receive order created response -> Redirect to /en/order-success
Navigate to /en/checkout -> Leave required address fields empty -> Click Place Order button -> See validation errors and remain on /en/checkout

features.name: Browse Categories
features.description: View categories list and filter products by selected category.
user_flows: Navigate to /en/categories -> View list of categories -> Click on a category -> Redirect to /en/categories/:category -> View products within selected category
Navigate to /en/categories -> Click on a category with no products -> See 'no products found' message

features.name: Favorites
features.description: Save products to a favorites list and manage saved items.
user_flows: Navigate to /en/products -> Click favorite (heart) icon on a product -> See UI confirmation that product was added to favorites -> Navigate to /en/favorites -> View the favorited product -> Click product -> Redirect to /en/products/:id
Navigate to /en/favorites -> See empty state message when no favorites exist

features.name: User Orders History
features.description: Authenticated customers can view their past and current orders with statuses and filters.
user_flows: Navigate to /en/orders (authenticated) -> View list of orders with status and dates -> Click on an order -> Redirect to /en/orders/:id
Navigate to /en/orders (unauthenticated) -> Get redirected to /en/login -> See message prompting to sign in

features.name: Order Detail (User)
features.description: View full details for a specific order, download order PDF, and navigate to edit, exchange or return flows when permitted.
user_flows: Navigate to /en/orders/:id (authenticated) -> View order items, status and delivery info -> Click Download order PDF -> Receive PDF download
Navigate to /en/orders/:id (authenticated) for an order not belonging to user -> See 'Not authorized' or 404 message

features.name: Request Exchange
features.description: Submit an exchange request for eligible items within an order.
user_flows: Navigate to /en/orders/:id/exchange (authenticated) -> Select items to exchange -> Fill in exchange reason -> Submit exchange request -> See success confirmation
Navigate to /en/orders/:id/exchange (authenticated) -> Select items outside allowed exchange window -> Submit exchange request -> See 'Exchange not allowed' error

features.name: Request Return
features.description: Submit a return request for eligible items within an order following return rules.
user_flows: Navigate to /en/orders/:id/return (authenticated) -> Select items to return -> Fill in return reason -> Submit return request -> See success confirmation
Navigate to /en/orders/:id/return (authenticated) -> Attempt return for an item blocked from returns -> See error explaining return is not permitted

features.name: User Profile
features.description: View and update customer profile details such as name, phone and addresses.
user_flows: Navigate to /en/profile (authenticated) -> View profile name, phone and address -> Edit profile fields -> Save changes -> See success toast and updated fields
Navigate to /en/profile (authenticated) -> Enter invalid phone format -> Click Save -> See phone validation error and changes are not saved

features.name: Admin Login
features.description: Authenticate admins using the admin API, establishing JWT cookie for access to protected admin routes.
user_flows: Navigate to /en/admin -> Enter admin credentials -> Submit login form -> Receive auth cookie (JWT) -> Redirect to /en/admin/dashboard
Navigate to /en/admin -> Enter incorrect credentials -> Submit login form -> See authentication error and remain on /en/admin

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Protected admin view showing KPIs, charts and navigation to admin sections (orders, products, inventory, finances).
user_flows: Navigate to /en/admin/dashboard (authenticated) -> View sales stats, order counts and revenue charts -> Click Orders section -> Redirect to /en/admin/orders
Navigate to /en/admin/dashboard (unauthenticated) -> Be redirected to admin login flow (/en/admin) or receive 'authentication required' notice

features.name: Admin Orders Management
features.description: Admin list and manage orders: filter, view details, update statuses and print/download PDFs.
user_flows: Navigate to /en/admin/orders (authenticated) -> View paginated orders list -> Filter orders by status or date -> Click an order -> Redirect to /en/admin/orders/:id -> Update order status to 'shipped' -> See status updated confirmation
Navigate to /en/admin/orders (authenticated) -> Attempt invalid status transition -> See error explaining invalid transition and status unchanged

features.name: Admin Products Management
features.description: Create, edit, delete and import products; manage product attributes, images and packs.
user_flows: Navigate to /en/admin/products (authenticated) -> Click New Product -> Redirect to /en/admin/products/new -> Fill in product name, price, category and upload images -> Submit to create product -> See new product listed on /en/admin/products
Navigate to /en/admin/products/new (authenticated) -> Submit with missing required fields -> See validation errors and remain on new product form

features.name: Admin Inventory Management
features.description: Track stock levels, create stock-in/stock-out operations and view inventory stats and operations history.
user_flows: Navigate to /en/admin/inventory (authenticated) -> View inventory stats and operations history -> Click to create a new operation -> Fill stock-in details -> Submit -> See operation added to history and stock levels updated
Navigate to /en/admin/inventory (authenticated) -> Create stock-out operation with quantity greater than available -> Submit -> See 'Insufficient stock' error and operation is rejected

features.name: Admin Exchanges and Returns
features.description: View and process exchanges and returns, approve or reject requests and update order/inventory accordingly.
user_flows: Navigate to /en/admin/exchanges-returns (authenticated) -> View pending exchanges and returns -> Click a request -> Approve the request -> See request status updated and inventory adjustments queued
Navigate to /en/admin/exchanges-returns (authenticated) -> Attempt to approve a return missing required evidence -> See error requiring additional documentation

features.name: Admin Invoices
features.description: Create and manage invoices, and generate downloadable invoice PDFs for customers and finance records.
user_flows: Navigate to /en/admin/invoices (authenticated) -> Click Create new invoice -> Fill invoice details -> Submit -> See invoice listed -> Click Download invoice PDF -> Receive invoice PDF
Navigate to /en/admin/invoices (authenticated) -> Attempt to download PDF for non-existing invoice id -> See 404 or 'Invoice not found' error

tech_stack.ui_library: Tailwind CSS v4, Radix UI, Lucide React

tech_stack.other: Prisma ORM, Zustand, i18next, JWT, Cloudinary, React Hot Toast

Admin order detail and status update

known_limitations.issue: App uses [lang] dynamic segment for i18n - all routes require a language prefix (e.g. /en/, /ar/)
known_limitations.impact: Tests must include the language prefix in all URLs

known_limitations.issue: Admin routes are protected by JWT stored in cookies - requires admin login before accessing admin pages
known_limitations.impact: Admin tests must first authenticate via /api/auth/admin/login
